trigger_condition: No argument or bad path: PowerShell resolves SCRIPT_PATH_RESOLVED to cwd or resolved path; pre_execution_guard requires an existing .m file
intended_purpose: Prevent MATLAB from running with a non-script target or accidental cwd-only resolution
risk_if_removed: MATLAB may run -batch with run('...') pointing at a directory or wrong target; confusing failures
notes: Empty arg is indistinguishable from ""run from cwd without script""; guard converts that into a clean exit 2

trigger_condition: Batch creates temp_runner_*.m with disp/pause(1) then deletes it; never passed to matlab -batch
live_execution_path: YES (code runs); NO (not on MATLAB path)
risk_if_removed: None; file is deleted after MATLAB returns
risk_if_kept: Operators may think a RUNNER_ENTERED probe is part of live truth
notes: system_reality_audit R1; contradicts single-call mental model if read as staging

trigger_condition: ScriptPath empty or whitespace
intended_purpose: Fail fast before MATLAB; log PRE_EXECUTION_INVALID_SCRIPT
risk_if_removed: MATLAB could launch with invalid -batch string; wasted time and opaque errors
evidence: tools/pre_execution_guard.ps1 L29-L32; tables/pre_execution_failure_log.csv policy in docs/repo_execution_rules.md
notes: Aligns with repo_execution_rules Pre-execution guard section

trigger_condition: GetFullPath throws or path resolution fails
Resolved path is not a file (Leaf)
risk_if_removed: MATLAB -batch run() would fail at runtime

trigger_condition: Path does not end with .m (case-insensitive)
risk_if_removed: Could pass wrong file type to run()
notes: Does not verify MATLAB installation or repo membership

trigger_condition: Script invoked manually or by external automation
intended_purpose: Structured checks for runnable scripts per docs/repo_execution_rules.md
risk_if_removed: Misunderstanding if treated as launch gate
evidence: tools/validate_matlab_runnable.ps1; system_execution_map.csv row 4; docs/repo_execution_rules.md L120-L122; reports/system_reality_audit.md L56-57
notes: Canonical Switching runs do not require this step

trigger_condition: FailValidation called when internal $block true
intended_purpose: Emit WARN lines; never non-zero exit
risk_if_removed: Automation using exit codes may treat FAIL as PASS
risk_if_kept: False confidence in CI or scripts
notes: All exit paths observed are exit 0

trigger_condition: Preconditions: file missing; path not absolute; path outside repo root; not .m; unreadable content
intended_purpose: Enforce path hygiene for manual validation
risk_if_kept: Bad scripts could be validated incorrectly if preconditions skipped
column21: Overlaps GUARD filesystem intent but adds repo/absolute rules guard does not

trigger_condition: CHECK_DRIFT fails when fopen targets .txt|.dat|.bin|.log etc.
intended_purpose: Detect output drift / unexpected file types
evidence: Canonical Switching script falsely flagged if validator treated as authoritative
column21: Signaling contract requires execution_probe_top.txt per repo_execution_rules L74-76

trigger_condition: Canonical state aggregates many CHECK_* failures into $canonicalFail including interactive/debug/fallback/output heuristics
evidence: Operators may think canonical script is invalid
recommended_phase: tools/validate_matlab_runnable.ps1 L417-L430; compare to run_switching_canonical.m structure

trigger_condition: exist(Aging/utils) ~= 7 after addpath
intended_purpose: Ensure createRunContext can be loaded from expected repo layout
risk_if_removed: createRunContext wrong or missing; run cannot establish context

trigger_condition: Legacy root Switching ver12 directory missing
which(createRunContext) resolved path case-normalized does not equal expected Aging/utils/createRunContext.m
evidence: Legitimate alternate dev layouts blocked without path edits
column21: Strict; justified for SSOT of run identity

trigger_condition: Switching_main.m missing under legacy main
regexp dir = ""..."" token empty from Switching_main.m
parentDir not an existing directory
intended_purpose: Ensure data path valid before IO
risk_if_removed: Silent bad runs or confusing errors later

trigger_condition: No subfolders matching Temp Dep* under parentDir
intended_purpose: Canonical pipeline expects legacy folder layout

trigger_condition: Folder missing Current_mA metadata (isfield + finite)
Current_mA non-finite or I_A zero after conversion
stability.switching.globalChannel not in {1..4}
tableData missing selected channel table
rowsCurrent empty after all folders (no usable samples)
totalRawFiles <= 0
tempsRaw or currents empty after grid build
assert(~isfile(execution_probe.csv)) after writetable
risk_if_removed: Broken run_dir or permissions; silent success elsewhere

trigger_condition: fopen report or implementation md returns fid < 0
intended_purpose: Fail hard if reports cannot be written

trigger_condition: try/catch: on error rethrow(ME) after FAILED status and alternate run_dir resolution
intended_purpose: Preserve signaling artifacts and error surfacing
risk_if_removed: Errors swallowed or no FAILED row
risk_if_kept: Extra run dirs on failure; identity differs from success path
notes: Not overblocking; ambiguity in which run_dir is authoritative for a crash

trigger_condition: exist(resolve_preset) && exist(select_preset) && exist(resolveNegP2P) optional branches
intended_purpose: Optional helpers from General ver2 / legacy if on path
notes: Ambiguity not a block; changes truth vs environment

trigger_condition: experiment name empty or nargin missing
writeManifest: fopen manifest_path fails
writeConfigSnapshot: fopen snapshot path fails
writeLogHeader: fopen log_path fails
run_manifest.json already exists -> warning and return without overwrite
risk_if_removed: Rerun could silently keep stale manifest
risk_if_kept: Stale manifest if folder reused; confusing identity
notes: Not a hard block; identity ambiguity

trigger_condition: makeUniqueRunId while exist(run_id dir) increments suffix
intended_purpose: Prevent two runs from same folder name collision
notes: Does not block; prevents silent overwrite via new id
